coreSkills.name: ts-impact
coreSkills.summary: runs ts-morph over changed TS files to produce a precise caller list per exported symbol.
coreSkills.when: Use before asserting a behavioral change is safe.

coreSkills.name: sentry-review
coreSkills.summary: adds production telemetry priors via Sentry MCP.
coreSkills.when: Use when Sentry is available and the diff touches production code.

repoSkills.name: db-migration-safety
repoSkills.summary: runs static checks over changed SQL migrations.
repoSkills.when: Use whenever the diff touches migration SQL.

repoSkills.name: trpc-edges
repoSkills.summary: maps changed server tRPC route handlers to their client call sites.
repoSkills.when: Use whenever route-level client reachability matters.

repoSkills.name: auth-review
repoSkills.summary: applies a repo-specific auth and permission checklist.
repoSkills.when: Use whenever the diff touches auth, permissions, refresh tokens, or websocket auth code.

repoAnalyzers.name: trpc-edges
repoAnalyzers.useWhen: Changed server router files when client call-site visibility matters

repoInvariants: API changes should be backward compatible by default.
Shipped desktop clients must stay compatible with newer server/API versions.
